‹ GalNet Chronicle
Entity Profile
T

Dredger-class bulk cruiser

Technology / Ship · First seen 3307-04-12 · 7 mentions
Active: 3307-04-12 → 3307-07-15
Mentions Timeline (7 articles)
3307-07-15
Kumo Crew Campaign Starts Drug Production
The Kumo Crew procures enough materials to mass-produce helix, confirmed by the IHO as a new variant of onionhead. President Hudson, Princess Aisling and other leaders express outrage. Archon Delaine defends the drug as bringing happiness and income to his people.
3307-07-09
Scriveners Clan Abandons the Hesperus
The Scriveners Clan dredger leaves the Perseus Dark Region KC-V c2-2 system after stripping the Hesperus's innards. Erik Gunnarson speculates they abandoned the salvage due to unwanted attention from thousands of curious travellers, or because they detected richer resources elsewhere.
3307-07-08
Kumo Crew Initiative to Produce New Commodity
The Kumo Crew syndicate requests deliveries to mass-produce 'helix', a recreational drug believed to originate from the Blue Viper Club dredger. Arch-Corsair Kay Volantyne claims it has medicinal and psychological benefits. Authorities express concern about drug addiction, with rumours suggesting helix may be a new strain of onionhead.
3307-07-02
Dredger Clan Arrives at Kumo City
A Blue Viper Club dredger enters the Pegasi Sector PN-T c3-14 system and takes position near Kumo City. Francesca Wolfe reports the clan's unsavoury reputation for drug running and raiding. Unmarked personnel shuttles travel between the dredger and Kumo City, suggesting a potential alliance with the Kumo Crew.
3307-06-11
The Legacy of the Hesperus
Pilots report new contact from 'Salvation' near the Hesperus and Adamastor. Commander Tyler Thorsen describes receiving a request to locate old signal beacons that could help find survivors from the megaship. The Pilots Federation cautions against working for potentially criminal organisations.
3307-04-27
Galactic Mysteries: The Hesperus
Francesca Wolfe details the discovery of the Hesperus alongside the Scriveners Clan dredger in the Perseus Dark Region. Pilots recovered encrypted logs revealing corporate rivalry, murder, and the involvement of a shadowy figure called "Salvation" who directed the search.
3307-04-12
Galactic Mysteries: Dredger Clans
Erik Gunnarson of Wallglass Investigations discusses the nomadic Dredger Clans — tribes living in converted bulk cruisers that roam deep space, scavenging and occasionally raiding. He mentions the Phagos clan's terrifying reputation and rumours of a rarely seen clan resurfacing.
